mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WEB_BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'N'

SELECT BOARD_NO, USER_NAME, BOARD_TITLE, CREATE_DATE, COUNT FROM WEB_BOARD W JOIN WEB_MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE W.STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT MAX(BOARD_NO) FROM WEB_BOARD
INSERT INTO WEB_BOARD ( USER_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent} )
INSERT INTO WEB_ATTACHMENT ( REF_BNO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH, BOARD_TYPE, FILE_LEVEL ) VALUES ( #{refBno}, #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{filePath}, #{boardType}, #{fileLevel} )
mapper.update: UPDATE WEB_BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, USER_NO, USER_NAME, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT FROM WEB_BOARD JOIN WEB_MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE WEB_BOARD.STATUS = 'N' AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT FILE_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH FROM WEB_ATTACHMENT WHERE REF_BNO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE WEB_BOARD SET STATUS = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND USER_NO = #{userNo}
